title: quercus × avellaniformis
intro: Quercus × avellaniformis, also known as the hybrid of pedunculate and sessile oak, is a rare and hybrid deciduous tree that is native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects due to its high content of polyphenols and flavonoids. The health benefits of Quercus × avellaniformis include reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease, improving cognitive function, and supporting immune system function. The herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into tea, tincture, or infusions, and are often used to promote overall health and well-being.
